visa_types.overview:
Overview
Invitation visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for official purposes or you have been invited by Official Organizations. This visa is given for travel period of less
                                                                    than 90 days. In case you are holding an Official Passport, you application will have to include a TPN – Third Party Note issued by the relevant authority.
                                                                
In case the travel purpose is Official, then an official email of request should be sent to the Visa Section of the Embassy of Italy in Colombo from your inviting party in Italy and from
                                                                    your Sri Lanka Organization whom you are representing. Also in case you are holding the TPN, this should be emailed to the Visa Section of the Embassy of Italy from the relevant local
                                                                    issuing authority.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Invitation visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for official purposes or you have been invited by Official Organizations. This visa is given for travel period of less
                                                                    than 90 days. In case you are holding an Official Passport, you application will have to include a TPN – Third Party Note issued by the relevant authority.
                                                                
In case the travel purpose is Official, then an official email of request should be sent to the Visa Section of the Embassy of Italy in Colombo from your inviting party in Italy and from
                                                                    your Sri Lanka Organization whom you are representing. Also in case you are holding the TPN, this should be emailed to the Visa Section of the Embassy of Italy from the relevant local
                                                                    issuing authority.

## Visa Fees

[ita > lka > en > Table:Invitation > Visa Fees 1]
Fees Details
- Visa fees and additional optional service fees can be paid in cash and credit or debit card at the counter in local currency. Service fees needs to be paid online at the time of booking the appointment.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 6,370.00 (17.50 EURO) per application submission at the Colombo Visa Application Centre and a service charge of MVR 310.00 (17.50 EURO) per application submission at the Male' Visa Application Centre over and above the visa fees.
- Mode of payment: Online (paid while booking an appointment)
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/lka/en/ita/travel-insurance).

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa provides for the temporary stay of persons who will be full-time religious workers in Schengen. Religious work is work of a religious nature for which the applicant has had relevant
                                                                    religious training. The religious work proposed must directly serve an organization’s religious objectives. It would usually be religious work involved in: 
- providing spiritual leadership
- conducting worship
- teaching or guidance in religion
- ministering, pastoral care or proselytizing
- other high level specialist work in relation to the above

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Family reunion visas are visas intended to reunite family members specifically husbands/wives, children and parents economically dependent on the sponsors. It is a long term (type D) period
                                                                    visa. The Family reunion visas must be authorized through the specified authorization ("NULLA OSTA") issued by the competent Italian Authorization in which are listed the family
                                                                    members who may apply for the visa.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (as defined by directive 2004/38/EC, i.e. spouse or registered partner, sons and daughters up to 21 years old and dependent parents) will be able to book an appointment through the fast track Prenot@mi, available at this link https://prenotami.esteri.it/ (https://prenotami.esteri.it/). Once the appointment has been booked, family members of EU citizens will need to show up directly at the Italian Embassy, 55 Jawatta Road, Colombo 05. Please do NOT book an appointment through Prenot@mi if you do not belong to one of the above categories.
If you intend to apply for a family reunion with EU citizen (365 gg) you have to use the checklist "FAMILY REUNIFICATION WITH EU CITIZENS" and the Italian national visa application form.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (as defined by directive 2004/38/EC, i.e. spouse or registered partner, sons and daughters up to 21 years old and dependent parents) will be able to book an appointment through the fast track Prenot@mi, available at this link https://prenotami.esteri.it/ (https://prenotami.esteri.it/). Once the appointment has been booked, family members of EU citizens will need to show up directly at the Italian Embassy, 55 Jawatta Road, Colombo 05. Please do NOT book an appointment through Prenot@mi if you do not belong to one of the above categories.
If you intend to apply for a family reunion with EU citizen (365 gg) you have to use the checklist "FAMILY REUNIFICATION WITH EU CITIZENS" and the Italian national visa application form.

- Mode of payment: Online (paid while booking an appointment)
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.

## Documents Required
Requisite documents for EU Citizens Visa (EU CITIZENS) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4A1eB1XTkiFUGC4kMPEPEA/bccca735489a7514ec66193ddf12de5f/eu-citizens.pdf)

                                                                    entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa provides for the temporary stay of persons who will be full-time religious workers in Schengen. Religious work is work of a religious nature for which the applicant has had relevant
                                                                    religious training. The religious work proposed must directly serve an organization’s religious objectives. It would usually be religious work involved in: 
- providing spiritual leadership
- conducting worship
- teaching or guidance in religion
- ministering, pastoral care or proselytizing
- other high level specialist work in relation to the above

URGENT COMMUNICATION ON EMPLOYMENT VISA
In force of the new Italian law issued by the Italian Parliament on the 11th of October 2024 (Decreto Legge n. 145 del 11/10/2024), NEW APPLICATIONS FOR EMPLOYMENT VISA WILL BE NOT ACCEPTED AND ALL PENDING APPLICATIONS WILL BE PROVISIONALLY SUSPENDED UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE.

We apologize for any inconvenience, and we thank you for your understanding.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (as defined by directive 2004/38/EC, i.e. spouse or registered partner, sons and daughters up to 21 years old and dependent parents) will be able to book an appointment through the fast track Prenot@mi, available at this link https://prenotami.esteri.it/ (https://prenotami.esteri.it/). Once the appointment has been booked, family members of EU citizens will need to show up directly at the Italian Embassy, 55 Jawatta Road, Colombo 05. Please do NOT book an appointment through Prenot@mi if you do not belong to one of the above categories.
For stays up to 90 days the checklist to use is "TOURISM - FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (max 90days) and the application form is the one for "SCHENGEN VISA".
Please NOTE:
ALL the other family members and relatives of EU citizens (e.g. sons and daughters over 21, non-dependent parents, brothers, sisters, uncles, nieces, nephews, grandparents etc.) must book an appointment with VFS, use the "TOURISM" checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5jtC3XJB7n8SCggy8wYVEO/7abf59d99fd5e03239cd00df7303747f/Schengen_Visa_Tourism_checklist_2025-For_Other_Family_Members_Submission_at_VFS.pdf) and the SCHENGEN VISA application form
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (as defined by directive 2004/38/EC, i.e. spouse or registered partner, sons and daughters up to 21 years old and dependent parents) will be able to book an appointment through the fast track Prenot@mi, available at this link https://prenotami.esteri.it/ (https://prenotami.esteri.it/). Once the appointment has been booked, family members of EU citizens will need to show up directly at the Italian Embassy, 55 Jawatta Road, Colombo 05. Please do NOT book an appointment through Prenot@mi if you do not belong to one of the above categories.
For stays up to 90 days the checklist to use is "TOURISM - FAMILY MEMBERS OF EU CITIZENS (max 90days) and the application form is the one for "SCHENGEN VISA".
Please NOTE:
ALL the other family members and relatives of EU citizens (e.g. sons and daughters over 21, non-dependent parents, brothers, sisters, uncles, nieces, nephews, grandparents etc.) must book an appointment with VFS, use the "TOURISM" checklist (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5jtC3XJB7n8SCggy8wYVEO/7abf59d99fd5e03239cd00df7303747f/Schengen_Visa_Tourism_checklist_2025-For_Other_Family_Members_Submission_at_VFS.pdf) and the SCHENGEN VISA application form

We apologize for any inconvenience and we thank you for your understanding.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Schengen Visa
Schengen visa have to be obtained from the Embassy of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application to the
                                                                        Italy Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the Embassy where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

Schengen visa have to be obtained from the Embassy of the country where the main purpose of travel lies. Therefore, please check your travel plans before making your application to the
                                                                        Italy Embassy. In case of travel to multiple Schengen countries, please make your application to the Embassy where you will be staying for the maximum number of days, or from the
                                                                        point of first entry into the Schengen countries, if the duration of stay is the same in more than one Schengen country.

Fees Details
- Visa fees and additional optional service fees can be paid in cash and credit or debit card at the counter in local currency. Service fees needs to be paid online at the time of booking the appointment.
- All fees are non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 6,370.00 (17.50 EURO) per application submission at the Colombo Visa Application Centre and a service charge of MVR 310.00 (17.50 EURO) per application submission at the Male' Visa Application Centre over and above the visa fees.
- Mode of payment: Online (paid while booking an appointment)
- Kindly bring the exact change in order to avoid any inconvenience.
